response.original_title: Coronación de la Reina del Trabajo
response.overview: A newsreel from the 1940s depicts the coronation ceremony of the "Queen of Labor" at the Municipal Theater. The winner of the contest, Miss Luz Amico, appears before a large audience accompanied by her ladies-in-waiting, and the Director General of Labor, Mr. Carlos Martínez, places a tiara on her head.
response.title: Coronación de la Reina del Trabajo
